title: ConferenceEntry Collection
description: Array of ConferenceEntry records. Each element: Artifact counts and badge breakdowns for a single conference across all tracked years.

YearBreakdown.description: Per-year breakdown of artifact counts and badges.

total.description: Total number of evaluated artifacts for this conference in this year.
total.title: Total

available.description: Number of artifacts that received the 'available' badge.
available.title: Available

functional.description: Number of artifacts that received the 'functional' badge.
functional.title: Functional

reproducible.description: Number of artifacts that received the 'reproduced' badge.
reproducible.title: Reproducible

reusable.description: Number of artifacts that received the 'reusable' badge.
reusable.title: Reusable

YearBreakdown.title: YearBreakdown

ConferenceEntry.description: Artifact counts and badge breakdowns for a single conference across all tracked years.

venue_type.description: Venue type: 'conference' for main conferences, 'workshop' for co-located workshops.
venue_type.title: Venue Type

total_artifacts.description: Total number of evaluated artifacts across all years for this conference.
total_artifacts.title: Total Artifacts

years.description: Per-year breakdown of artifact counts and badge distributions. Ordered chronologically.
years.title: Years

ConferenceEntry.title: ConferenceEntry
